ddls:
CREATE TABLE "concepts" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each concept entry */,
  "concepticon_id" INTEGER /* Concepticon ID associated with the concept */,
  "concepticon_gloss" TEXT /* Gloss definition of the concept */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Numerical representation associated with the concept */,
  "english" TEXT /* English term of the concept */,
  "concept_type" TEXT /* Type of the concept (e.g., ordinal, cardinal, fraction) */,
  "semantic_field" TEXT /* Semantic field the concept belongs to (e.g., time, space, quantity) */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example sentences or usage of the concept */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the concept was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the concept */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who added the concept */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concepts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family (e.g., Indo-European, Sino-Tibetan) */,
  "script" TEXT /* Writing script used (e.g., Latin, Cyrillic, Chinese) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the language was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the language */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who added the language */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation entry */,
  "concept_id" TEXT /* Reference to the concept being translated */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the translation */,
  "translated_term" TEXT /* Translated term in the target language */,
  "transliteration" TEXT /* Transliterated form of the term */,
  "phonetic_representation" TEXT /* Phonetic representation of the term */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence using the translated term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the translation was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the translation */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who added the translation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, editor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
